The following events took place in '''3995 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]], a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] campaign to eradicate the [[Sithspawn/Legends|Sithspawn]] known as [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]], begins in the aftermath of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].<ref name="NEC" />
*The [[Restoration Period]] begins for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="KOTOR Campaign">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] originally placed the beginning of the [[Kanz Disorders/Legends|Kanz Disorders]] in c. 3995 BBY, but later sources established the start of the Disorders to be [[3670 BBY]].
